message:
Running command: # The amuxbus ports remain in wrapper.v port list. In previous run they caused GPL-0326.
# We need to check if they will cause issues. The previous fix was to remove them from port list.
# Let's check: are these ports connected anywhere, or just floating?
# Count lines in wrapper - check what's between port declaration and u_core
awk 'NR>=1 && NR<=30' /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
